title: Elbow Grease Rinse Aid | Streak Free Fast Drying Formula | Prevent Water Marks & Film - Brilliant Shine & Glass Protection (Lemon Fresh, 500ml)
features: STREAK-FREE FINISH: Helps stop water marks and cloudy film so plates come out looking polished. Ideal after a big family roast when everything needs to sparkle without rewashing.
FAST-DRYING HELP: Speeds up drying so less moisture sits on dishes and glassware. Perfect for busy evenings when the dishwasher is running back-to-back and items need putting away fast.
GLASS PROTECTION: Designed to give clear glass protection and a brilliant shine on delicate stemware. Great for dinner parties, keeping wine glasses and tumblers bright and photo-ready.
FIGHTS HARD WATER: Helps reduce spotting in hard water areas where glasses can look dull. Brilliant for everyday cups and mugs, especially after tea, coffee, and squash stains.
WORKS IN ALL MACHINES: Suitable for all dishwashers and easy to use in the built-in dispenser. A simple upgrade for both slimline and full-size models in flats, homes, and offices.
LEMON FRESH BOOST: Leaves a light lemon-fresh scent that feels like a dishwasher freshener. Handy when the machine has been closed up overnight after a full load.
EASY AUTOMATIC DOSING: Pours neatly into the rinse aid compartment and dispenses automatically each wash. Useful for households that want great results without measuring or adding extras.
500ML LONG-LASTING: The 500ml bottle keeps the rinse aid going and helps avoid running out mid-month. Great for larger households, shared kitchens, or anyone who relies on the dishwasher daily.
LESS WIPING, MORE DOING: Helps cut down the need to towel-dry glasses and cutlery after the cycle. Perfect before guests arrive, when there’s no time for hand polishing every piece.
SPOTLESS CUTLERY: Keeps knives, forks and spoons looking bright by helping prevent water spots. Ideal after lasagne night when cutlery is coated and needs a clean, streak-free finish.
description: Product Description Elbow Grease Rinse Aid is the little finishing touch that makes every wash look like a “just polished” moment. This dishwasher rinse aid helps prevent water marks, streaks and that annoying cloudy film, so plates, cutlery and glassware come out with an unbeatable shine. The fast drying formula encourages water to sheet away from surfaces, meaning fewer droplets left behind and less time spent shaking, wiping or re-running a load. Suitable for all dishwashers, it works through the built-in rinse dispenser, so it quietly gets on with the job in the background. Pop it into the dispenser, top up as needed, and let the machine do the rest. The lemon fresh scent keeps things feeling clean and bright, acting like a gentle dishwasher freshener after curry nights, fish Fridays, or a packed weekend of family cooking. From everyday mugs to delicate wine glasses, clear glass protection helps keep items looking crisp and ready to use. For best results, use alongside regular detergent and enjoy that satisfying sparkle when the dishwasher door opens. The 500ml bottle keeps the shine going in busy kitchens, day after day. Ingredients Contains reaction mass of 5-chloro-2-methyl-2H-isothiazol-3-one and 2-methyl 2H-isothiazol-3-one(3:1)(55965-84-9) Contains amongst other ingredients: 5-15% Non Ionic Surfactants, Parfum, Limonene. Directions Refer to your dishwasher manufacturers instructions. Pour the rinse aid into the rinse aid dispenser. The rinse aid will be automatically dispensed. Refill the dispenser monthly. See more
